patch.value: chore: 2026-07-06 ecosystem audit #14 — WIP status hygiene (docstring family reset) + stale in-progress detection backlog
Full-ecosystem audit #14: verified all 1,634 items' structural integrity and reset phantom WIP.

All active items verified parented (only root milestone pm-doxj parentless); every pm validate warning maps to exactly one open item; in_progress list contains only genuinely active work; new findings captured as dedup-checked items; changelog regenerated last

## Audit #14 scope & method (2026-07-06)
Full pass over 1,634 items (147→148 open after new finding, 12→3 in_progress after reset, 1,463 closed, 12 canceled legit archives/probes).

## Verified green
- Orphans: zero (only root milestone pm-doxj is parentless, by design) — checked via direct .agents/pm TOON grep (unquoted 'status:' format).
- Every validate warning maps to exactly one open item: 18 close_reason + 269 resolution → pm-e9zh; 146 missing / 134 orphaned linked files → pm-j8z6; GH-209 duplicate issue code → pm-pivf.
- pm health green: 1,634 vector-ledger entries, 0 stale.
- Roadmap milestone pm-doxj indexes all 13 capability epics + 3 initiatives (pm-n7rr, pm-usfg, pm-9rxu) with horizon ordering; composability set pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1 present.
- Head commit dc0dc252 fully covered by audit #13 (pm-lgim); no untracked code/feature work found (only open PRs are 3 dependabot bumps).

## Gap found & fixed
Docstring initiative pm-4ak1 + 8 child tasks were phantom in_progress since 07-04/05: no claim, no branch, no PR, no commits. Reverted family to open (comment on pm-4ak1); remaining in_progress is genuine (pm-rjqr landed partial work in 9c909a58 today; pm-lt6n awaits Windows nightly oracle; pm-92if living epic).

## New backlog item
pm-w8q4 (Feature, under pm-dj98): stale in-progress detection — validate/health warn on unclaimed+inactive in_progress items + advisory on unclaimed status flips. Dedup-checked (stale/abandoned/claim/lease/heartbeat searches).

Audit complete: structural integrity verified (zero orphans, all validate warnings mapped, health green, roadmap index current); phantom WIP reset (9 docstring items → open); one new dedup-checked backlog item pm-w8q4.
Every feature/issue/idea tracked in well-defined items; honest statuses; no duplicates created.
1,634 items audited; 1 status-hygiene gap found and fixed; 1 new item created; validate/health re-verified green after mutations.

author: maintainer-agent
